layout.update_detected: An updated app version was detected. Reloading...
index.header.title: Create A New Job
index.header.description: Complete Hugging Face / pyannote setup first, then choose video files or a directory and start a job.
index.setup.title: Check Settings First
index.active.title: Currently Running
index.active.none_description: When a job starts, a progress summary appears here.
index.form.files.title: Choose Files
index.form.files.description: You can select multiple video files at once.
index.form.directory.title: Choose A Directory
index.form.directory.description: On Edge / Chrome-based browsers you can choose a directory and send the videos under it.
index.form.select_input: Select video files or a directory.
index.form.cache_notice: Uploaded videos are treated as temporary cache. They are deleted 10 minutes after a job completes or fails, and immediately when the job is deleted.
index.history.title: Completed Jobs
index.history.description: Completed runs can be downloaded as ZIP files. Unneeded runs can be deleted.
index.history.empty: There are no completed jobs yet.
settings.header.description: Save your Hugging Face token first. Then you can create a job.
settings.models.title: Models Used By This App
settings.cache.title: Saved Models
settings.cache.description: Delete saved models here if you want the app to download them again.
settings.cache.empty: There are no saved model files to delete.
settings.notice.title: One model needs approval on Hugging Face.
settings.notice.description: Save your token, then open the approval page for the speaker split model.
settings.token_hint: A saved token stays masked here. Enter a new token only when you want to replace it.
settings.compute_mode.title: Processing Mode
settings.compute_mode.description: Choose CPU or GPU. GPU is faster, but it only works when Docker can use your NVIDIA GPU.
settings.compute_mode.gpu_note: Faster when GPU access is available.
settings.compute_mode.gpu_unavailable_no: GPU is not ready yet. CPU will still work.
settings.compute_mode.gpu_unavailable: GPU mode is not available on this machine yet.
settings.compute_mode.help_intro: Use GPU mode only when this PC and Docker can access a supported NVIDIA GPU.
settings.compute_mode.help_req_docker: Docker must be able to use the GPU through CUDA.
settings.compute_mode.help_req_high: High quality needs about 10 GB or more of VRAM.
settings.compute_mode.help_req_8gb: A GPU with 8 GB can often use Standard, but High may stay unavailable.
settings.processing_quality.title: Processing Quality
settings.processing_quality.description: Choose how detailed the transcription model should be. High uses a larger model and needs a suitable GPU.
settings.processing_quality.standard_not: Balanced speed and quality. Uses WhisperX medium.
settings.processing_quality.high_note: Higher accuracy. Uses WhisperX large-v3 and is intended for a GPU with about 10 GB or more of memory.
settings.processing_quality.high_unavail: High needs GPU mode and a usable NVIDIA GPU with about 10 GB or more of memory.
High quality is only available when GPU mode is usable and enough GPU memory is available.
settings.save_success: Settings saved. You can create a new job now.
settings.token_required: Enter a Hugging Face token before continuing.
settings.save_blocked: Complete the required setup fields before continuing.
settings.save_pending: Settings were saved, but approval is still needed.
settings.language.title: Language
settings.language.heading: App Language
settings.language.description: Change the language used in this app.
language.header.title: Choose Language
language.header.description: Choose the language to use in this app before opening settings.
language.form.label: Language
language.form.hint: You can change this later in Settings.
jobs.new.description: Choose your video files, then press Start.
jobs.new.files_description: Pick one or more video files from this computer.
jobs.new.directory_description: Pick one folder and upload every video inside it.
jobs.new.cache_notice: Uploaded videos are temporary. They are deleted after the job finishes or when you delete the job.
jobs.new.select_input: Choose video files or a folder first.
jobs.new.duplicate_prompt_message: {0} of {1} selected files were already converted. Reprocess them, or skip them and continue with the remaining {2} new files.
jobs.new.duplicate_prompt_message_all: All {0} selected files were already converted. Reprocess them, or skip them without creating a new job.
jobs.new.duplicate_no_job_message: All selected files were already converted, so no new job was created.
jobs.new.upload_waiting: Your videos will upload first. Then processing starts.
jobs.new.upload_leave_warning: A file upload is still running.
jobs.list.description: See the current job and browse all jobs in one list.
jobs.list.delete_all_confirm: Type DELETE to remove all completed and failed jobs.
jobs.active.title: Active Job
jobs.active.heading: Now Processing
jobs.active.description: Only one job runs at a time. Open details to see more.
jobs.active.empty: There is no active job right now.
details.rerun_description: Create a new job from the same inputs. Explicit reruns always process the selected files again, even if matching results already exist.
details.rerun_original_note: Uses the compute mode and processing quality saved with this job.
details.rerun_current_note: Uses the current Settings values for compute mode and processing quality.
details.generated_timeline_empty: There are no generated timeline items to display yet.
details.generated_timeline_reused_missin: A previous result was found, but the reused timeline file is no longer available. Run the file again to generate a fresh timeline.
details.worker_log_empty: No worker log is available yet.
error.subtitle: An error occurred while processing your request.
error.development_description: Switching to the Development environment displays detailed information about the error that occurred.
error.development_warning: Do not enable the Development environment for deployed applications. It can expose sensitive exception details to end users. For local debugging, set ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT to Development and restart the app.
privacy.description: Use this page to describe how uploaded files, generated output, tokens, and temporary cache are handled.
access.authorized: Access to the pyannote model is available.
access.unauthorized: Token is saved, but approval is still needed.
